text: Could we go over the roadmap together?
We are launching the new feature in May.

Priya said she would book the training.
Thanks for joining across the time zones, Patrícia. Could we go over the roadmap first?
Of course. So, we are launching the new feature in May, and the next release is on track.
Great. One piece of feedback: the client deck had a lot of detail.
That is a fair point. Perhaps it might be better to start with the big picture. My takeaway is to simplify it.
Perfect. And what did Priya say about the training?
She said she would book it once the deck is ready. Let us align on the date and circle back by email.

Hi Patrícia, this is David from the product team in San Francisco. I am leaving a quick note before our global sync tomorrow. Here is my plan for the call. First, I will walk the team through the roadmap, so everyone is aligned on the next release. We are launching the new reporting feature in May, and I am going to share the timeline for the rest of the quarter. I know the time zones are tricky, so I will keep my part short. One small piece of feedback from my side: the last deck had a lot of detail, and perhaps it might be better to start with the big picture. Could you bring the client's top requests to the sync? Let us circle back on the training dates after we agree on the roadmap. Thanks, and talk tomorrow.

Hi Patrícia, it is Priya in Bangalore, just a short note before the product sync. I have read David's roadmap, and it looks good from my side. In our last call, the team said the new feature would ship in May, and that is still the plan. I want to build a little rapport with the new engineers, so I will start with a quick hello before we get into the details. One takeaway from the client feedback: they really like the new dashboard, but they asked for fewer clicks. I told them we would look at it, so it is now an action item, and I am the owner. The time zone overlap is small, so let us keep the sync focused. If we run out of time, we can circle back by email. See you on the call.

We are launching the new feature in May.
I will share the timeline after the call.
